description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 variable, defining two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs a privileged almalinux:8 container, installs git, curl, sudo, zip, unzip via dnf, clones the INTER-Mediator repository, downloads and extracts mitamae, runs ./mitamae local with the provided recipe, enables Ruby 3.1, installs ruby, rake and serverspec gems, generates a spec_helper.rb and runs rspec on the sample spec, installs Composer, adds phpunit, updates dependencies, sets locale en_GB and runs composer test, then runs composer jest, and finally stops and removes the almalinux container. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, creates a public directory, starts a privileged php:8.2-fpm-alpine container with the workspace mounted, updates apk, installs git, bash, zip, nodejs, npm, zlib-dev, libpng-dev, icu-dev and curl, installs Composer, clones the minify repo if missing, clones INTER-Mediator, runs npm ci, executes ./dist-docs/buildup.sh --core, zips the INTER-Mediator source into INTER-Mediator-master.zip and moves it to /public, lists files, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact.
